theme: one dam release calendar for wet and dry years
title: One Release Calendar for Wet and Dry Years
strategies: drain-fast bang-bang schedule that only satisfies the corridor edge-to-edge (checker baseline, ratio ~0.1)
safety-heavy schedule that hugs the low-storage edge of the true corridor (feasible everywhere, wastes head)
single-scenario robust plan built from whichever scenario has the largest FINAL total inflow (looks rigorous, overflows whenever a different, smaller-total scenario peaks earlier)

running max/min-over-scenarios envelope of cumulative inflow, releasing the bare minimum needed against the true worst prefix at every week (keeps storage -- and head -- high in every scenario at once)
